name: The GPU Devourer
title: Infinite Compute Maw
lore: A furnace-beast that eats compute clusters and exhales molten tensors.
phase_1: Normal form: a plated machine with a restrained thermal core.
phase_2: Mutated form: cooling towers snap open into claws and intake fans become teeth.
phase_3: Corrupted form: molten cache spills from its chassis and burns the grid.
phase_4: Final Nightmare form: a starved compute singularity with an endless reactor mouth.

name: The Data Leak Hydra
title: Breach-Headed Security Monster
lore: Every severed secret becomes another head, hissing credentials into the dark.
phase_1: Normal form: three encrypted heads watch the raid perimeter.
phase_2: Mutated form: leaked keys grow into new heads and exposed ports split open.
phase_3: Corrupted form: redacted files peel away as toxic data streams pour out.
phase_4: Final Nightmare form: a many-headed breach storm wrapped around a broken vault.

name: The Gradient Vanisher
title: Fading Backprop Phantom
lore: An entity losing definition with every step, leaving dead gradients in its wake.
phase_1: Normal form: a sharp silhouette traced by clean vector lines.
phase_2: Mutated form: its limbs smear into fading echoes that lag behind its body.
phase_3: Corrupted form: transparent fractures erase pieces of its torso and face.
phase_4: Final Nightmare form: a near-invisible void outlined by collapsing signal ghosts.

name: The Hallucination Titan
title: Corrupted AI God
lore: A towering oracle that speaks in impossible outputs and bends reality around false predictions.
phase_1: Normal form: a luminous titan wrapped in stable prediction rings.
phase_2: Mutated form: duplicate faces split from its skull and argue across the arena.
phase_3: Corrupted form: error sigils tear through its body as hallucinated limbs emerge.
phase_4: Final Nightmare form: a fractured godhead broadcasting contradictory realities.

name: The Overfitted Beast
title: Training-Data Abomination
lore: A mutant model that memorized everything and learned nothing.
theme: Mutated model obsessed with training data
phase_1: Normal form: a chained beast covered in neat dataset labels.
phase_2: Mutated form: sample cards fuse into armor and its claws become decision trees.
phase_3: Corrupted form: memorized examples burst through its skin as jagged shards.
phase_4: Final Nightmare form: a bloated archive-monster screaming duplicated training rows.

name: The Prompt Goblin
title: Chaotic Trickster AI
lore: A small, vicious prompt thief that rewrites instructions while laughing in terminal noise.
phase_1: Normal form: a wiry trickster clutching a stolen command token.
phase_2: Mutated form: prompt scrolls become claws and its grin splits into command flags.
phase_3: Corrupted form: injection strings crawl across its body and scramble its outline.
phase_4: Final Nightmare form: a glitchy command imp wearing a crown of broken system prompts.
